info.name: Homemade Food API
info.description: API collection for the Homemade Food platform including Authentication and Dishes modules

query.description: Search chefs by name, bio, or cuisine specialties. Case-insensitive partial match.
Filter by online status. Use "true" for online chefs or "false" for offline.
Filter by verification status. Use "true" for verified chefs or "false" for unverified.
Filter chefs with rating greater than or equal to this value (decimal number).
Page number for pagination. Default is 1.
Number of results per page. Controls how many chefs are returned in each page.

description.content:
## Chefs List Endpoint

List all chefs with optional filtering and pagination.

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Example | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `search` | string | No | `?search=Italian` | Search by chef name, bio, or specialties |
| `is_online` | boolean | No | `?is_online=true` | Filter by online status |
| `is_verified` | boolean | No | `?is_verified=true` | Filter by verification status |
| `min_rating` | decimal | No | `?min_rating=4.5` | Minimum rating filter |
| `page` | integer | No | `?page=2` | Page number for pagination |
| `page_size` | integer | No | `?page_size=10` | Number of items per page |

### Example Requests

**Get all chefs:**
```
GET /api/auth/chefs/
```

**Search by cuisine:**
```
GET /api/auth/chefs/?search=Italian
```

**Filter by online status:**
```
GET /api/auth/chefs/?is_online=true
```

**Filter by verification:**
```
GET /api/auth/chefs/?is_verified=true
```

**Filter by minimum rating:**
```
GET /api/auth/chefs/?min_rating=4.5
```

**With pagination:**
```
GET /api/auth/chefs/?page=2&page_size=10
```

**Combined filters:**
```
GET /api/auth/chefs/?search=Italian&is_online=true&min_rating=4.5&page=1&page_size=10
```

### Response Format

```json
{
  "count": 50,
  "next": "/api/auth/chefs/?page=2",
  "previous": null,
  "results": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "user": {
        "id": 1,
        "first_name": "John",
        "last_name": "Chef",
        "email": "chef.john@example.com",
        "phone_number": "+1234567890",
        "profile_picture": "https://example.com/john-chef.jpg",
        "address_longitude": -122.4194,
        "address_latitude": 37.7749,
        "created_at": "2023-01-15T10:00:00Z",
        "updated_at": "2023-01-15T10:00:00Z",
        "is_active": true,
        "user_type": "chef"
      },
      "rating": 4.8,
      "total_reviews": 120,
      "bio": "Experienced Italian chef with 10 years in the industry.",
      "cuisine_specialties": "Italian, Mediterranean",
      "years_of_experience": 10,
      "is_verified": true,
      "is_online": true,
      "created_at": "2023-01-15T10:00:00Z",
      "updated_at": "2023-01-15T10:00:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `count` | integer | Total number of chefs matching the filter |
| `next` | string/null | URL to next page (null if last page) |
| `previous` | string/null | URL to previous page (null if first page) |
| `results` | array | Array of chef objects |

### Notes

- All query parameters are optional and can be combined
- Search searches chef name, bio, and cuisine specialties
- Default page size is 20

query.description: Search dishes by dish name or chef name (first/last). Case-insensitive partial match.
Filter dishes by category name. Case-insensitive partial match (e.g., "Italian" matches "Italian Cuisine").
Filter dishes by chef ID. Returns only dishes created by the specified chef.
Filter dishes with price greater than or equal to this value (decimal number).
Filter dishes with price less than or equal to this value (decimal number).
Filter by availability status. Use "true" for available dishes or "false" for unavailable.
Page number for pagination. Default is 1.
Number of results per page. Controls how many dishes are returned in each page.

description.content:
## Dishes List Endpoint

List all available dishes with optional filtering and pagination.

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Example | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `search` | string | No | `?search=pizza` | Search by dish name or chef name |
| `category_name` | string | No | `?category_name=Italian` | Filter by category name |
| `chef-id` | integer | No | `?chef-id=1` | Filter by chef ID |
| `min_price` | decimal | No | `?min_price=10` | Minimum price filter |
| `max_price` | decimal | No | `?max_price=25` | Maximum price filter |
| `is_available` | boolean | No | `?is_available=true` | Filter by availability |
| `page` | integer | No | `?page=2` | Page number for pagination |
| `page_size` | integer | No | `?page_size=10` | Number of items per page |

### Example Requests

**Get all dishes:**
```
GET /api/dishes/
```

**Search by dish name:**
```
GET /api/dishes/?search=pizza
```

**Search by chef name:**
```
GET /api/dishes/?search=John
```

**Filter by category:**
```
GET /api/dishes/?category_name=Italian
```

**Filter by chef:**
```
GET /api/dishes/?chef-id=1
```

**Filter by price range:**
```
GET /api/dishes/?min_price=10&max_price=25
```

**With pagination:**
```
GET /api/dishes/?page=2&page_size=10
```

**Combined filters:**
```
GET /api/dishes/?search=pizza&category_name=Italian&chef-id=1&min_price=10&max_price=25&page=1&page_size=10
```

### Response Format

```json
{
  "count": 50,
  "next": "/api/dishes/?page=2",
  "previous": null,
  "results": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Spaghetti Carbonara",
      "price": "15.99",
      "is_available": true,
      "preparation_time": 20,
      "chef": {
        "id": 1,
        "first_name": "John",
        "last_name": "Chef"
      },
      "category": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Italian"
      },
      "created_at": "2026-02-24T22:32:30.758770Z",
      "average_rating": 4.5,
      "image": null
    }
  ]
}
```

### Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `count` | integer | Total number of dishes matching the filter |
| `next` | string/null | URL to next page (null if last page) |
| `previous` | string/null | URL to previous page (null if first page) |
| `results` | array | Array of dish objects |

### Notes

- All query parameters are optional and can be combined
- Search searches both dish name and chef name (first/last)
- Category name search is case-insensitive partial match
- Default page size is determined by server configuration

## Dish Detail Endpoint

Get detailed information about a specific dish including chef info, ratings, and review preview.

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Example | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | integer | Yes | `/api/dishes/1/` | The unique dish ID |

### Example Request

```
GET /api/dishes/1/
```

### Response Format

```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Spaghetti Carbonara",
  "description": "Classic Roman pasta with eggs, cheese, pancetta and pepper",
  "price": "15.99",
  "is_available": true,
  "preparation_time": 20,
  "chef": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Chef John Chef",
    "rating": 4.8,
    "total_reviews": 120,
    "specialties": ["Italian", "Mediterranean"],
    "profile_picture": "/media/profile_pics/chef1.jpg"
  },
  "category": {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Italian",
    "description": "Authentic Italian cuisine",
    "dish_count": 8
  },
  "images": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "image_url": "/media/dishes/carbonara.jpg",
      "is_primary": true
    }
  ],
  "reviews_preview": [
    {
      "id": 5,
      "user_name": "Sarah",
      "rating": 5,
      "review_text": "Absolutely delicious!",
      "created_at": "2026-03-07T18:30:00Z"
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "user_name": "Mike",
      "rating": 4,
      "review_text": "Great taste, good portion.",
      "created_at": "2026-03-05T20:15:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "variety_sections": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Size Options",
      "description": "Choose your portion size",
      "is_required": false,
      "options": [
        {"id": 1, "name": "Small", "price_adjustment": "0.00", "is_available": true},
        {"id": 2, "name": "Large", "price_adjustment": "4.00", "is_available": true}
      ]
    }
  ],
  "rating_avg": 4.5,
  "reviews_count": 1243,
  "created_at": "2023-02-01T12:00:00Z",
  "updated_at": "2023-02-01T12:00:00Z"
}
```

### Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `id` | integer | Unique dish identifier |
| `name` | string | Dish name |
| `description` | string | Full dish description |
| `price` | string | Base price (decimal as string) |
| `is_available` | boolean | Whether dish can be ordered |
| `preparation_time` | integer | Estimated prep time in minutes |
| `chef` | object | Chef information |
| `chef.id` | integer | Chef's user ID |
| `chef.name` | string | Chef's full name with "Chef" prefix |
| `chef.rating` | number | Chef's average rating (0-5) |
| `chef.total_reviews` | integer | Total reviews across all chef's dishes |
| `chef.specialties` | array | List of cuisine specialties |
| `chef.profile_picture` | string/null | Chef's profile picture URL |
| `category` | object | Category information |
| `images` | array | Array of dish images |
| `reviews_preview` | array | Latest 3 reviews (preview only) |
| `reviews_preview[].user_name` | string | Reviewer's first name |
| `reviews_preview[].rating` | integer | Rating 1-5 |
| `reviews_preview[].review_text` | string | Review comment |
| `variety_sections` | array | Customization options (sizes, toppings, etc.) |
| `rating_avg` | number | Average dish rating (0-5) |
| `reviews_count` | integer | Total number of reviews |
| `created_at` | datetime | When dish was created |
| `updated_at` | datetime | Last modification timestamp |

### Notes

- `reviews_preview` contains only the **latest 3 reviews** for performance
- Use the **Get Dish Reviews** endpoint with pagination to fetch all reviews
- `rating_avg` and `reviews_count` are computed efficiently via database annotations

query.description: Page number for pagination
Number of results per page (max 100)

description.content:
## Dish Reviews Endpoint (Paginated)

Get all reviews for a specific dish with pagination support.

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Example | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dish_id` | integer | Yes | `/api/dishes/1/reviews/` | The dish ID to get reviews for |

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Example | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | integer | No | `?page=2` | Page number for pagination |
| `page_size` | integer | No | `?page_size=10` | Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100) |

### Example Requests

**Get first page of reviews (default 20 per page):**
```
GET /api/dishes/1/reviews/
```

**Get specific page:**
```
GET /api/dishes/1/reviews/?page=2
```

**Custom page size:**
```
GET /api/dishes/1/reviews/?page=1&page_size=10
```

### Response Format

```json
{
  "count": 1243,
  "next": "/api/dishes/1/reviews/?page=2&page_size=20",
  "previous": null,
  "results": [
    {
      "id": 5,
      "dish": 1,
      "customer": {
        "id": 3,
        "first_name": "Sarah",
        "last_name": "Johnson",
        "email": "consumer.sarah@example.com",
        "profile_picture": "/media/profile_pics/sarah.jpg"
      },
      "rating": 5,
      "review_text": "Absolutely delicious! Authentic taste.",
      "created_at": "2026-03-07T18:30:00Z",
      "updated_at": "2026-03-07T18:30:00Z"
    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "dish": 1,
      "customer": {
        "id": 4,
        "first_name": "Mike",
        "last_name": "Davis",
        "email": "consumer.mike@example.com",
        "profile_picture": null
      },
      "rating": 4,
      "review_text": "Great carbonara, though I prefer more pepper.",
      "created_at": "2026-03-05T20:15:00Z",
      "updated_at": "2026-03-05T20:15:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Response Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `count` | integer | Total number of reviews |
| `next` | string/null | URL to next page (null if last page) |
| `previous` | string/null | URL to previous page (null if first page) |
| `results` | array | Array of review objects |

### Review Object Fields

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `id` | integer | Review ID |
| `dish` | integer | Dish ID (reference) |
| `customer` | object | Customer who wrote the review |
| `customer.id` | integer | Customer user ID |
| `customer.first_name` | string | Customer's first name |
| `customer.last_name` | string | Customer's last name |
| `customer.email` | string | Customer's email |
| `customer.profile_picture` | string/null | Profile picture URL |
| `rating` | integer | Rating score (1-5) |
| `review_text` | string | Written review comment |
| `created_at` | datetime | When review was created |
| `updated_at` | datetime | Last update timestamp |

### Notes

- Reviews are ordered by **created_at descending** (newest first)
- Default page size is **20 reviews per page**
- Maximum page size is **100 reviews per page**
- Use `page` and `page_size` query parameters for pagination

query.description: Filter by order status (pending, accepted, out_for_delivery, delivered, cancelled, rejected)
Filter orders from this date onwards (YYYY-MM-DD)
Filter orders up to this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
Page number for pagination
Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)

description.content:
## List Orders

List orders filtered by user role (consumer sees own orders, chef sees received orders).

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Example | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `status` | string | No | `?status=pending` | Filter by order status |
| `date_from` | date | No | `?date_from=2024-01-01` | Filter from date |
| `date_to` | date | No | `?date_to=2024-12-31` | Filter to date |
| `page` | integer | No | `?page=2` | Page number |
| `page_size` | integer | No | `?page_size=10` | Results per page |

### Response Format

```json
{
  "count": 5,
  "next": null,
  "previous": null,
  "results": [
    {
      "order_id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
      "customer_name": "John Doe",
      "chef_name": "Chef Mario",
      "status": "pending",
      "total_amount": "35.98",
      "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z",
      "items_count": 2,
      "estimated_ready_time": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Create Order

Place a new order (consumer only). All items must belong to the same chef.

### Request Body

```json
{
  "chef_id": 2,
  "delivery_address": "123 Main St",
  "delivery_longitude": -122.4194,
  "delivery_latitude": 37.7749,
  "special_instructions": "Optional notes",
  "items": [
    {
      "dish_id": 1,
      "quantity": 2,
      "special_requests": "No onions",
      "variety_selections": [
        {"section_id": 1, "option_id": 1}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

### Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `chef_id` | integer | Yes | Chef who will fulfill the order |
| `delivery_address` | string | Yes | Full delivery address |
| `delivery_longitude` | decimal | No | Delivery location longitude |
| `delivery_latitude` | decimal | No | Delivery location latitude |
| `special_instructions` | string | No | General order notes |
| `items` | array | Yes | List of order items |
| `items[].dish_id` | integer | Yes | Dish to order |
| `items[].quantity` | integer | Yes | Quantity (min: 1) |
| `items[].special_requests` | string | No | Per-item notes |
| `items[].variety_selections` | array | No | Size/options selections |
| `variety_selections[].section_id` | integer | Yes | Variety section ID |
| `variety_selections[].option_id` | integer | Yes | Variety option ID |

### Response

Returns full order detail with `order_id` (UUID), items, pricing, and timestamps.

## Get Order Detail

Get full order details including all items and variety selections.

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Example | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `order_id` | UUID | Yes | `/api/orders/{uuid}/` | The order UUID |

### Response Format

```json
{
  "order_id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "customer": 3,
  "customer_name": "John Doe",
  "chef": 2,
  "chef_name": "Chef Mario",
  "status": "accepted",
  "subtotal": "25.98",
  "delivery_fee": "10.00",
  "total_amount": "35.98",
  "estimated_preparation_minutes": 30,
  "estimated_ready_time": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  "delivery_address": "123 Main St",
  "special_instructions": "Leave at door",
  "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z",
  "accepted_at": "2024-01-15T10:05:00Z",
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "dish_name": "Spaghetti Carbonara",
      "dish_base_price": "15.99",
      "quantity": 2,
      "unit_price": "15.99",
      "item_total": "31.98",
      "special_requests": "No onions",
      "variety_selections": [
        {
          "section_name": "Size Options",
          "option_name": "Large",
          "price_adjustment": "4.00"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## Update Order Status

Transition order to a new status. Only valid transitions allowed per status flow.

### Valid Status Transitions

| From | To | Actor |
|------|----|-------|
| `pending` | `accepted` | Chef |
| `pending` | `rejected` | Chef |
| `pending` | `cancelled` | Chef or Consumer |
| `accepted` | `out_for_delivery` | Chef |
| `accepted` | `cancelled` | Chef |
| `out_for_delivery` | `delivered` | Chef |

### Request Body

```json
{
  "status": "accepted",
  "cancellation_reason": "Optional reason if cancelling"
}
```

### Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `status` | string | Yes | New status |
| `cancellation_reason` | string | No | Reason for cancellation |

### WebSocket Events

On success, broadcasts:
- `status_update` to order-specific group
- `notification` to affected user

## List Notifications

Get all order notifications for the authenticated user.

### Response Format

```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "order_id": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
    "notification_type": "order_accepted",
    "notification_type_display": "Order Accepted",
    "message": "Your order has been accepted.",
    "is_read": false,
    "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:05:00Z"
  }
]
```

### Notification Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `order_placed` | New order placed |
| `order_accepted` | Chef accepted order |
| `order_rejected` | Chef rejected order |
| `order_cancelled` | Order cancelled |
| `preparation_reminder` | Reminder to chef |
| `out_for_delivery` | Order on the way |
| `delivered` | Order delivered |

## Mark Notification as Read

Mark a single notification as read.

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `pk` | integer | Yes | Notification ID |

### Response

Returns the updated notification object with `is_read: true`.

## Cancel Expired Orders

Manually trigger auto-cancellation for pending orders older than 5 minutes.

**Requires admin/staff authentication.**

### Response

```json
{
  "cancelled_count": 3
}
```

### Notes

- Only cancels orders with `status=pending` and `created_at > 5 minutes ago`
- Sends notification to affected customers
- In production, this runs automatically via Celery beat every minute
